panelDescription: Vivi grills you until your idea is a rigorous canonical spec, writing Markdown into .vivicy/ as areas settle.
engineBadgeTitle: Set in Agent settings — not editable here
emptyState: Tell Vivi what you want to build — a sentence is enough to start. Vivi will ask the questions that turn it into a complete spec.
